# CWE-344 safe — Use of Invariant Value in Dynamically Changing Context (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-344-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func SignInvoice(c *GinCtx, payload []byte) ([]byte, error) {
	secret := os.Getenv("BILLING_HMAC_SECRET")
	if secret == "" {
		return nil, os.ErrInvalid
	}
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(secret))
	mac.Write(payload)
	return mac.Sum(nil), nil
}
